address.address1: Rima Asri Residence, No. 2 Rima keunerem

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Airport transfer
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Children 0-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: Brand new vacation house- Private gated community

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Brand new vacation house- Private gated community
comments.reviewPositives: The place is very clean and new. The host is really nice. And everything in the house works perfectly. TV has many channels, and the bed is very comfy. The parking area is large and the house has a gate. Feel very safe. Highly recommend this place.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Brand new vacation house- Private gated community
comments.reviewNegatives: providing better facilities, and professional service, the price should be worth!
comments.reviewPositives: It is near the beach, but the facilities including clean water are horrible. I did not take a shower for a day in this place due to no water. Sorry to say, the owner should manage the facilities and the person in charge to provide better service. I, as a customer, look for a comfortable place for vacation.
comments.reviewTitle: I wish the owner provide better service

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Brand new vacation house- Private gated community
comments.reviewNegatives: Hygiëne, was 1 kamer opgemaakt en maar voor 1 kamer beddengoed aanwezig, we checkten later in zoals aangegeven ivm boottijden. Maar we moesten meer dan een uur wachten voor we in de accommodatie konden.
